title: eleocharis pachycarpa
intro: Eleocharis pachycarpa is a type of grass-like perennial plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in various herbal medicine systems, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating respiratory issues. Eleocharis pachycarpa can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to be consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice.
